text.title: Diary Studies Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when applying diary-studies; each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Participation tracks 80% on day 1, 35% on day 7; sparse longitudinal data.
antipattern.fix: Schedule push at expected daily time + SMS fallback after 6 hours.

antipattern.symptom: Daily-only study misses key incident entries (e.g., 'app crashed mid-task').
antipattern.fix: Offer both daily reflection + event-triggered prompts; instruct participants.

antipattern.symptom: Participant writes 'I had a hard week with the app' at week-end instead of moment-by-moment entries.
antipattern.root-cause: Reminder cadence too lax; participant writes from memory.
antipattern.fix: Daily prompt + entry deadline within 2h; weekend-batched entries flagged in analysis.
